name: gopherguard
//: Go 1.25+ is required (see go.mod toolchain go1.25.11). The 'go:1' tag tracks the latest Go 1.x; pin to a specific digest if reproducibility across time is needed.

ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/docker-in.//: Needed later for the local OTel collector / Grafana-Tempo trace stack (M3).
